name: Rough Notes to Document
description: Turn rough bullet points or messy notes into a clean, polished markdown document

config.userPrompt:
Transform the rough notes below into a clean, well-structured document.
Requirements:
- Use clear markdown headers to organize sections.
- Expand brief bullet points into coherent sentences.
- Fix grammar and awkward phrasing while preserving the original meaning.
- Remove duplicate or redundant content.
- Add a short one-paragraph summary at the top.
- Keep all original facts, names, and specifics — do not invent new content.

NOTES:
{{INPUT}}
